title: Pretty Clear Water
description: Makes water more transparent so you can see whats hiding in it.
body:
![A Banner :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b335d500b34ffb00dbf16c061e6ed030885310d.png)
### What is Pretty Clear Water?
Pretty Clear Water makes the water more transparent so that you can see shipwrecks, water caves, ocean ruins, clay, gravel, etc. underneath the water easily.
### Why would you want to download it?
Pretty Clear Water makes the water more transparent which helps you traverse easily and get a whole lot of loot in game.
> **Contact:** jagrav.modrinth@gmail.com
